description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set within a rectangular plot, surrounded by a low boundary wall and lush green lawns. The structure features a flat roof with multiple skylights and large windows, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The front entrance is accentuated by a small porch, flanked by manicured shrubs and a paved driveway leading to a carport on the right. Several mature trees are strategically placed around the property, providing shade and enhancing curb appeal. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious backyard, with a small shed or greenhouse visible in one corner. The overall design is modern, with clean lines, light-colored exterior walls, and a harmonious integration with the landscaped surroundings.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring trees, lawns, and a driveway with carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, driveway, and several trees lining the front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade, backyard lawn, and the shed or greenhouse in the rear corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, carport, and the shed or greenhouse, with the driveway curving around.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway entrance, side lawn, and the arrangement of trees along the boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and skylights
